channel.title: June 2026 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in June 2026 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: What’s New in Microsoft Foundry | June 2026
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry’s June 2026 update adds Claude GA and several agent-related features released between Build 2026 and the end of June. It also calls out autopilot agents, expanded Toolboxes and Routines, and Agent Optimizer entering private preview.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: dotnet: .NET and .NET Framework June 2026 servicing releases updates
item.description:
This post is a brief recap of the June 2026 servicing updates for .NET and .NET Framework. The provided content does not include specific version numbers, fixes, or security details.

  • Source: .NET
